title: Rob Duncan Printer Of The Year
genre: of dramatic arts – performance printing. 'Brilliantly, hilariously stupid' (Frankie Boyle).
description: In 2024, Rob Duncan was named Printer of the Year. After 15 years in the industry, he was finally recognised as a pioneer in his field. This show is an hour of printing, celebrating his award and debuting a new category of dramatic arts – performance printing. 'Brilliantly, hilariously stupid' (Frankie Boyle).

venue.name: Junk Poets at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peters Church, York Place, East Sussex
